spellcasting.name: Teórica da Winterhold
headerEntries: Rosa tem vantagem em testes de **Arcana ou Investigação** relacionados a:

spellcasting.name: Marca do Mentor
headerEntries: Uma vez por descanso longo, quando Rosa falha um teste de magia importante, ela pode:
- mas fica Abalada (desvantagem no próximo teste de Sabedoria)

spellcasting.name: Teórica da Winterhold
headerEntries: Rosa tem vantagem em testes de **Arcana ou Investigação** relacionados a:

spellcasting.name: Marca do Mentor
headerEntries: Uma vez por descanso longo, quando Rosa falha um teste de magia importante, ela pode:
- mas fica Abalada (desvantagem no próximo teste de Sabedoria)

trait.name: Cunning Action
entries: On each of its turns, He Xiao can take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action as a bonus action.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: He Xiao deals an extra 10 ({@damage 3d6}) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 feet of an ally of He Xiao that isn't incapacitated and He Xiao doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

trait.name: Assassinate
entries: He Xiao has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn in the combat yet. Any hit He Xiao scores against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

trait.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: He Xiao can use its reaction to halve the damage of an attack that hits it.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: If He Xiao is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, He Xiao instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: He Xiao makes two attacks with its Dagger or two attacks with its Hand Crossbow.

action.name: Dagger
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Poison damage.
{@actSave con} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Poisoned|XPHB} condition until the end of He Xiao's next turn.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 30/120 ft. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d6 + 4}) Piercing damage, plus Sneak Attack if applicable.

reaction.name: Uncanny Dodge
entries: {@actTrigger} He Xiao is hit by an attack. {@actResponse} He Xiao halves the attack's damage against it.

trait.name: Rage (2/Day)
entries: As a bonus action, Thorn enters a rage for 1 minute. While raging, Thorn has advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, deals 2 extra damage with melee weapon attacks, and has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. The rage ends early if Thorn is knocked unconscious or if Thorn's turn ends and she hasn't attacked a hostile creature since her last turn or taken damage since then.

trait.name: Reckless Attack
entries: At the start of her turn, Thorn can gain advantage on the first melee weapon attack roll she makes during that turn, but attack rolls against her have advantage until the start of her next turn.

trait.name: Brutal Charge
entries: If Thorn moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a melee weapon attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 4 ({@damage 1d8}) damage and must succeed on a {@actSave str} {@dc 15} or be pushed up to 10 feet away.

trait.name: Stop the Fight
entries: Komic's intent is to measure, not to kill. Thorn calls the fight when two enemies drop to 0 hit points, or when Thorn is reduced to 45 hit points or fewer.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Thorn makes two Greatsword attacks.

action.name: Greatsword
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 8}, reach 5 ft. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) Slashing damage. While Thorn is raging, the attack deals 14 ({@damage 2d6 + 7}) Slashing damage instead.

trait.name: Agonizing Blast
entries: Dodman's {@spell Eldritch Blast|XPHB} adds his Charisma modifier to the damage it deals on a hit.

trait.name: Veteran of War
entries: Once on each of his turns, Dodman can impose disadvantage on the first attack roll made against him before the start of his next turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Dodman is a 7th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks). Dodman has two 2nd-level spell slots, which he regains when he finishes a short or long rest.

action.name: Eldritch Blast
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 120 ft. (two beams). {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Force damage per beam.

action.name: Staff
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}5 ({@damage 1d6 + 2}) Bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Unholy Step (Recharge 4–6)
entries: As a bonus action, the conductor teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space it can see. This movement leaves behind a brief, unsettling afterimage of the ritual.

trait.name: Calculated Retreat
entries: When the conductor is reduced to 30 hit points or fewer, it prioritizes escape over victory, disengaging and using Unholy Step whenever possible.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The conductor is a spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks).

action.name: Ritual Dagger
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 5 ft. {@h}4 ({@damage 1d4 + 2}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Ritual Pulse (1/Combat)
entries: The conductor triggers the ritual pulse immediately (as if it were Initiative count 20). This doesn't cause an extra pulse for the round; it only makes the next pulse happen early.

resist.note: from nonmagical attacks while the abomination has more than 40 hit points

trait.name: Wrong Instinct
entries: At the start of its turn, if a noncombatant or mount is within 30 feet of it and a player character is within 30 feet of it, roll a {@dice d6}:
1–3. The abomination attacks the nearest creature.
4–6. The abomination rushes toward the noncombatant or mount, acting in panicked confusion.

trait.name: Rupture (1/Day)
entries: When the abomination is reduced to 45 hit points or fewer for the first time, it releases a necrotic rupture. Each creature within 10 feet of it must make a {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage, and the creature can't regain hit points until the end of the abomination's next turn.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The abomination makes two Claw attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) Slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

action.name: Impure Dash (Recharge 5–6)
entries: The abomination moves up to 30 feet without provoking opportunity attacks and makes one Claw attack. If the attack hits, the target must succeed on a {@actSave str} {@dc 14} or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.

trait.name: Seal Anchor
entries: A ritual focus is a stationary anchor powering the ritual pulses. A creature can use its action to make a Religion or Arcana check (DC 14) to disable one focus (breaking the seal) instead of dealing damage to it. On a failure by 5 or more, the creature takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage.

trait.name: Caçador da Winterhold
entries: Wen has advantage on Intelligence (Arcana), Intelligence (Investigation), and Wisdom (Survival) checks made to track or identify undead, fiends, curses, or ritual traces.

trait.name: Pacto Infernal Controlado
entries: When Wen reduces a hostile creature to 0 hit points, he gains 5 temporary hit points. If this happens during a scene where his patron's influence is narratively relevant, describe a brief smell of ash, iron, or old parchment.

trait.name: NPC de Apoio
entries: Wen should help the party without stealing the spotlight. In the banshee encounter, prefer using him to identify clues, protect a weakened character, or damage minions instead of solving the main objective alone.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Wen is a 5th-level warlock. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks). Wen has two 3rd-level spell slots, which he regains when he finishes a short or long rest.

action.name: Eldritch Blast
entries: {@atkr r} {@hit 7}, range 120 ft. (two beams). {@h}9 ({@damage 1d10 + 4}) Force damage per beam.

action.name: Pact Knife
entries: {@atkr m,r} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d4 + 4}) Piercing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Fire damage.

action.name: Infernal Brand (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Wen marks one creature he can see within 60 feet. The target must make a {@actSave wis} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 13 ({@damage 3d8}) Psychic damage, and the next attack roll made against the target before the end of Wen's next turn has advantage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage, and no advantage is granted.

bonus.name: Fiendish Step (Recharge 4–6)
entries: Wen teleports up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space he can see. After teleporting, he gains 5 temporary hit points.

reaction.name: Hellish Rebuke (2/Day)
entries: {@actTrigger} Wen is damaged by a creature within 60 feet that he can see. {@actResponse} The creature must make a {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 11 ({@damage 2d10}) Fire damage. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage.

monster.name: Elyra dos Cedros

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: Elyra can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. She takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Force damage if she ends her turn inside an object.

trait.name: Ligada às Árvores Marcadas
entries: While at least one Árvore Marcada is active in the encounter, Elyra can use Passo entre Cedros and the Mãos da Floresta hazard remains active.
When all marked trees are disabled or destroyed, Elyra loses her resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks until the end of the encounter.

trait.name: Anti-TPK — Lamento Quebrado
entries: If the fight becomes too lethal, describe the marked trees cracking or the trapped spirits resisting Elyra. For 1 round, Elyra cannot use legendary actions, or the Mãos da Floresta hazard loses one active tree for its scaling.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Elyra makes two Withering Touch attacks, or one Withering Touch attack and uses Canto Convocador if available.

action.name: Withering Touch
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 7}, reach 5 ft. {@h}15 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) Necrotic damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage.

action.name: Canto Convocador (Recharge 5–6)
entries: Elyra chooses up to three creatures she can see within 60 feet that can hear her. Each target must succeed on a {@actSave wis} {@dc 15} or be {@condition Charmed|XPHB} by Elyra until the end of the target's next turn. While charmed this way, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet, and the target must use its movement to move closer to the nearest active Árvore Marcada by the safest available path.

action.name: Lamento da Clareira (1/Day)
entries: Each living creature of Elyra's choice within 60 feet that can hear her must make a {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 21 ({@damage 6d6}) Psychic damage, and the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn. {@actSaveSuccess} Half damage, and the target isn't frightened. Creatures already frightened by Elyra have disadvantage on this saving throw.

bonus.name: Passo entre Cedros (Recharge 4–6)
entries: If Elyra is within 5 feet of a tree, she teleports to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of another tree she can see within 60 feet.

reaction.name: Sumir na Casca
entries: {@actTrigger} Elyra is hit by an attack while within 5 feet of an active Árvore Marcada. {@actResponse} Elyra reduces the damage by 7 ({@damage 2d6}) and teleports up to 10 feet to a space she can see.

legendaryHeader: Elyra can take 2 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. Elyra regains spent legendary actions at the start of her turn.

legendary.name: Drift
entries: Elyra moves up to half her flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Echo Strike
entries: Elyra makes one Withering Touch attack against a creature within reach.

legendary.name: Call a Hand (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: One Mão do Tronco within 60 feet can make one Branching Grasp attack.

trait.name: Passo pela Mata
entries: The eco ignores nonmagical difficult terrain made of roots, branches, undergrowth, or fallen logs.

trait.name: Sussurro ao Cair
entries: When the eco is reduced to 0 hit points, each enemy creature within 5 feet of it must succeed on a {@actSave wis} {@dc 12} or have disadvantage on the next Wisdom saving throw it makes before the end of its next turn.

action.name: Grasping Claw
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 4}, reach 5 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) Slashing damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage. If the target is within 10 feet of a tree, it must succeed on a {@actSave str} {@dc 12} or have the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While motionless and attached to a tree, the mão is indistinguishable from ordinary bark, roots, or broken branches.

trait.name: Âncora de Casca
entries: The mão can't willingly move away from the tree or trunk it is attached to. It can still make attacks with its reach.

trait.name: Punição de Cover
entries: The mão has advantage on its first Branching Grasp attack against a creature that is using the attached tree as cover.

action.name: Branching Grasp
entries: {@atkr m} {@hit 5}, reach 10 ft. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d6 + 3}) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Necrotic damage, and the target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition (escape {@dc 13}). Until this grapple ends, the mão can't use Branching Grasp on another target.

reaction.name: Grab from Cover
entries: {@actTrigger} A creature within 10 feet of the mão gains cover from the tree the mão is attached to. {@actResponse} The mão makes one Branching Grasp attack against that creature.

trait.name: Marca do Lamento
entries: This tree anchors Elyra's grief and empowers the Mãos da Floresta hazard. A creature can use its action to make an Intelligence (Arcana), Wisdom (Nature), or Intelligence (Religion) check ({@dc 14}) to disable one tree instead of damaging it.

A creature can also make a Charisma (Performance) or Charisma (Persuasion) check ({@dc 15}) if it tries to calm or release one of the trapped echoes. On a failure by 5 or more, the creature takes 3 ({@damage 1d6}) Psychic damage.

trap.name: Ritual Pulse (3 Focuses)
entries: The ritual emits a pulse on Initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), once per round. The pulse's strength depends on how many focuses are still active.

entries.name: Scaling
entries: 3 focuses active: **Strong Pulse**
2 focuses active: **Medium Pulse**
1 focus active: **Light Pulse**
0 focuses: the pulses end.

entries.name: Light Pulse (1 Focus)
entries: Roll a {@dice d6}:
1–2 **Cold Mist.** A 20-foot-radius area becomes difficult terrain until the next pulse.
3–4 **Panic Echo.** {@actSave wis} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The creature has disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.
5–6 **Hand at the Boot.** {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The creature's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its turn.

entries.name: Medium Pulse (2 Focuses)
entries: Roll a {@dice d6}:
1–2 **Necrotic Wave.** {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Necrotic damage; on a success, half damage.
3–4 **Crack in Will.** Creatures concentrating on a spell must make a {@actSave con} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The creature loses concentration.
5–6 **Call of the Stables.** One noncombatant or mount panics and moves up to 30 feet in a dangerous direction unless restrained.

entries.name: Strong Pulse (3 Focuses)
entries: Roll a {@dice d6}:
1–2 **Necrotic Wave (Strong).** {@actSave con} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 10 ({@damage 3d6}) Necrotic damage; on a success, half damage.

3–4 **Field of Invisible Claws.** Until the next pulse, the ritual circle area is difficult terrain, and any creature that starts its turn there must succeed on a {@actSave dex} {@dc 15} or have the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
5–6 **Rift of the Ritual.** {@actSave dex} {@dc 15}. {@actSaveFail} 7 ({@damage 2d6}) Bludgeoning damage and the creature is pushed 10 feet.

entries.name: Emergency Dial (anti-TPK)
entries: If the fight turns lethal, you can reduce the pulse one step for one round (Strong→Medium) as the circle destabilizes.

trap.name: Mãos da Floresta (3 Árvores Marcadas)
entries: The haunted clearing acts on Initiative count 20 (losing initiative ties), once per round. Its strength depends on how many Árvores Marcadas are still active.

entries.name: Scaling
entries: 3 marked trees active: **Strong Grasp**
2 marked trees active: **Medium Grasp**
1 marked tree active: **Weak Grasp**
0 marked trees active: the hazard ends.

entries.name: Weak Grasp (1 Tree)
entries: Choose one creature within 10 feet of a tree or large root. The target must make a {@actSave str} or {@actSave dex} {@dc 13}. {@actSaveFail} The target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the end of its next turn.
A 10-foot-radius area around the active tree becomes difficult terrain until the next pulse.

entries.name: Medium Grasp (2 Trees)
entries: Choose one creature using a tree as cover or standing within 10 feet of a tree. The target must make a {@actSave str} or {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}. {@actSaveFail} The target has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.
If there is a Mão do Tronco attached to that tree, it can immediately make one Branching Grasp attack against the target instead.

entries.name: Strong Grasp (3 Trees)
entries: Choose up to two creatures that are using trees as cover, standing within 10 feet of trees, or isolated from the rest of the party. Each target must make a {@actSave str} or {@actSave dex} {@dc 14}.
{@actSaveFail} The target takes 5 ({@damage 1d10}) Necrotic damage and has the {@condition Grappled|XPHB} condition until the end of its next turn.
After resolving the saves, one inactive tree or trunk in the clearing manifests a Mão do Tronco if fewer than two Mãos do Tronco are currently active.

entries.name: Emergency Dial (anti-TPK)
entries: If the fight is too deadly, reduce the hazard by one step for 1 round as the trapped spirits resist Elyra. If the fight is too easy, one Mão do Tronco appears at Initiative 20, but only if the party has not disabled any marked tree yet.
